title: Renewable Transport Fuel Obligation (RTFO) statistics 2024: Final report

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Supply of renewable fuels for January to December 2024. Table RF_0103 revision note: The ‘still in existence’ values for 2023 and 2024 were not accounting for the use of certificates carried over from the previous obligation year. The incorrect calculation was: certificates still in existence = issued - revoked - redeemed This has been corrected to:

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: certificates still in existence = issued + carried over from previous year - revoked - redeemed Also, the 2022 ‘still in existence’ value was corrected as those certificates have since been used. This results in the ‘redeemed’ values for 2022 also being adjusted to the correct value.

sourceReferences.citationText: dft-press-office – Official Statistics: Renewable Transport Fuel Obligation (RTFO) statistics 2024: Final report
